textByHashes.a842d60d6485111a1b5bd2fcd9d51cc0e766bc9b: Quickly, tell me - is it still there?
textByHashes.6c54c954668480c6232faf368926e0e69394f8a9: The THING, the THING! It was just outside my house! Has it gone away yet? Or is it still lurking out there, waiting for me to go outside?
textByHashes.8e66f3a39ad63ba0a385793fd661ac05323523f8: Ohhhh, it was HORRIBLE! It was an enormous THING, with TEETH and EYES and... and... and THINGS!
textByHashes.087f4e7ed5d7a040865503917c4a5f61b92ad0a6: I can't. I only saw it in the dark.
textByHashes.d6ef04f632fe02320c1ee80c33be685ed2b46028: I was sleeping peacefully one night, when suddenly I woke up and saw it through the window. It was LOOKING at me! I haven't dared go out since then. It's had me trapped in here for days! I've packed my
textByHashes.8fff42a66ffbbed312eede9a36a1065930cceef0: bags so I can escape, but the THING's still out there waiting for me to come out! If I have to stay in here much longer I'll go mad! MAD!! MAD!!!
textByHashes.f26cbaf2a676554e8b1fe53c143346f6e58741dd: You want me to go outside?
textByHashes.3bb7a73cdfe5e05cb87a0fe14515d7bfcb83c0c6: You want me to believe that it's not real?
textByHashes.3e0213d681733eab6283e50271c4a4341d231a48: No! No! I know what you are! You're in league with the THING! It keeps sending people in here to trick me into going outside! They keep stealing from me too! GO AWAY!
textByHashes.fad6aa2a525f2076bb2f226e83381389efcf1f14: Something's happening in the party room!
textByHashes.c867ee502d4ae2015c97f79712b32d16ae31dd23: Everyone get to the party room!
textByHashes.554c0b3373f8a950084c152f7a74034decb1054b: What's happening in the party room?
textByHashes.7063e9aab6ee66bf02d3b5cc19ad0186aca1fe7c: Get to the party room NOW!
textByHashes.82b6c1de93b3cc2c9c5900f73dac304d73c6580e: Get to the party room quick!
textByHashes.7fa8ced345fd888ea1e0dfc6600a0618683f518d: Big value items in the party room now!
textByHashes.435f720e7200b358882db130256e630747329c74: Quick! Get to the party room!
